NOTICE OF MOTION TO APPROVE PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT AND FOR ENTRY OF CONSENT JUDGMENT, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF MATEEL ENVIRONMENTAL JUSTICE FOUNDATION HEARING SET FOR MAY-12-2004 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301
REPLY MEMO & SUPPLEMENTAL DECL OF DAVID WILLIAMS IN SUPP OF MTN TO APPROVE PROP 65 SETTLEMENT & FOR ENTRY OF CONSENT JUDGMNT FILED BY PLTF
MINI-MINUTES FOR MAY-12-2004 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION 301, PLAINTIFF MATEEL ENVIRONMENTAL JUSTICE FOUNDATION'S MOTION TO APPROVE PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT AND FOR ENTRY OF CONSENT JUDGMENT: GRANTED. 1) WARNING REQUIRED COMPLIES WITH PROP. 65; 2) ATTORNEY'S FEES ($15,000.00) ARE REASONABLE; 3) PENALTY IS REASONABLE. ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED. JUDGE: JAMES L. WARREN REPORTER: CHRISTINA PAXTON, CSR #1558
THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: (CONSENT JUDGMENT) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
